TODO-sprint-progress.prompt: Generate a sprint progress update now. You MUST save the report as a self-contained HTML file (inline CSS, no external dependencies) to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/sprint-progress-YYYYMMDD.html (using today's date). Also save a copy to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/sprint-progress-latest.html. Use the Segoe UI font, a blue header with sprint name/dates, summary cards for counts (completed/in-progress/not-started/blocked), a work items table, highlights, and risks sections. Open the report in Edge after saving.
TODO-sprint-progress.description: Queries ADO work items and meeting notes to generate sprint progress report

ado-status-update.prompt: Run ADO autopilot LIVE for both meeting-join and meeting-notes areas. Execute these commands sequentially from Q:/src/hackathon/ado-autopilot/: (1) python src/main.py update-status --config configs/meeting-join.json --auto-approve (2) python src/main.py update-status --config configs/meeting-notes.json --auto-approve. This will generate reports AND write approved updates to ADO. Copy the newly generated HTML reports from reports/ folder to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/. The tool generates files named meeting-join-report-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html and meeting-notes-report-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html -- copy them preserving their original filenames, and also copy each as meeting-join-latest.html and meeting-notes-latest.html respectively. After reports are saved, run the comparison script: python Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/Compare-Runs.py. Open the comparison summary and both reports in Edge after completion.
ado-status-update.description: Runs ADO autopilot status tweet update (live) for Meeting Join and Meeting Notes areas

bug-autopilot-meeting-join.prompt: Run bug-autopilot LIVE for Meeting Join area bugs. Steps: (1) cd Q:/src/hackathon/bug-autopilot/ (2) git pull to get latest code (3) Validate configs exist and are valid JSON (4) pip install -r requirements.txt --quiet (5) Run: powershell.exe -File bugautopilot.ps1 -Once (6) Copy the newly generated HTML report from reports/ (named run-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html) to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/ preserving its original filename, and also copy it as bug-autopilot-latest.html (7) Run the comparison script: python Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/Compare-Runs.py (8) Open the report in Edge.
bug-autopilot-meeting-join.description: Runs bug-autopilot live for Meeting Join bugs

ado-burndown-update.prompt: Run ADO autopilot burndown LIVE for both meeting-join and meeting-notes areas. Execute these commands sequentially from Q:/src/hackathon/ado-autopilot/: (1) python src/main.py update-burndown --config configs/meeting-join.json --auto-approve (2) python src/main.py update-burndown --config configs/meeting-notes.json --auto-approve. This will generate reports AND write approved burndown updates to ADO. Copy the newly generated HTML reports from reports/ folder to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/. Preserve original filenames and also copy each as burndown-meeting-join-latest.html and burndown-meeting-notes-latest.html respectively. Open both reports in Edge after completion.
ado-burndown-update.description: Runs ADO autopilot burndown update (live) for Meeting Join and Meeting Notes areas

bug-autopilot-notes.prompt: Run bug-autopilot LIVE for Meeting Notes area bugs. Steps: (1) cd Q:/src/hackathon/bug-autopilot/ (2) git pull to get latest code (3) Validate configs exist and are valid JSON (4) pip install -r requirements.txt --quiet (5) Run: powershell.exe -File bugautopilot.ps1 -Config Q:/src/hackathon/bug-autopilot/configs/meeting-notes.json -Once (6) Copy the newly generated HTML report from reports/ (named run-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html) to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/ preserving its original filename, and also copy it as bug-autopilot-notes-latest.html (7) Run the comparison script: python Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/Compare-Runs.py (8) Open the report in Edge.
bug-autopilot-notes.description: Runs bug-autopilot live for Meeting Notes bugs

TODO-compare-runs.prompt: Compare all scrum-master reports and create GitHub issues for detected problems. Run: python Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/Compare-Runs.py (without --dry-run flag to actually create issues). This will parse ADO autopilot HTML reports and bug autopilot investigations.json, compare across runs, generate a summary at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/run-summaries/, and create GitHub issues in teams-microsoft/ado-autopilot and teams-microsoft/bug-autopilot repos. Issues that were already created (tracked in issue-state.json) will be skipped. Open the comparison summary in Edge after completion.
TODO-compare-runs.description: Compares run results across runs and files GitHub issues for detected problems
